title: Dick Jenkins
compiled_truth: Dick Jenkins is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-09-10), Dick Jenkins sent 2 and received 650 emails, totalling 652 interactions.
